fixes.origin:
command = f"{tool} --json {target}"
completed = subprocess.run(
    command,
    shell=True,
    cwd=str(workspace),
    capture_output=True,
    text=True,
)
fixes.replacement:
tool = {"netprobe": "netprobe", "traceprobe": "traceprobe"}.get(tool, "netprobe")
completed = subprocess.run(
    [tool, "--json", target],
    cwd=str(workspace),
    capture_output=True,
    text=True,
)
